basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Scout Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website pau.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PAU Scout Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years

salary_details.details: Fixed salary Rs.12506+800 EPF/ESI per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Scout Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
